title: trisetum flavescens var. corsicum
intro: Trisetum flavescens var. corsicum, also known as Corsican False Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum flavescens var. corsicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and seeds can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
